phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala de pedra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH PEHD-ruh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao anfitrião ou ao chefe de sala, que podem indicar o local da Sala de pedra.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW ahnng-feet-REEOWN OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh, KIH PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW loo-KAHL DUH SAH-luh DIH PEHD-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the host or the head waiter, they can point you to the stone dining room.

responses.english: Ask the host or the head waiter, they can point you to the stone dining room.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW ahnng-feet-REEOWN OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh, KIH PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW loo-KAHL DUH SAH-luh DIH PEHD-ruh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao anfitrião ou ao chefe de sala, que podem indicar o local da Sala de pedra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Cozido das Furnas is served
phrases.text_local: Onde é que serve cozido das Furnas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH KIH SEH-ruh-vih koo-ZEE-doo DUHSH FOO-ruh-nuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional regional dishes are typically served throughout the main dining area rather than in designated sections.

phrases.text_local: Pode indicar-me onde fica a sala de pedra?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR-MIH OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH PEHD-ruh?

likely_response.local: A sala de pedra é uma área do Restaurante O Calhau. Pergunte ao anfitrião ou ao chefe de sala para ser encaminhado.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH SAH-luh DIH PEHD-ruh EH OO-muh AH-reeuh DOO rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih AW kuh-LYOW. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW ahnng-feet-REEOWN OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh PUH-ruh SIHR ayng-kuh-mee-NYAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: The stone room is an area of Restaurante O Calhau. Ask the host or head waiter to be directed.

responses.english: The stone room is an area of Restaurante O Calhau. Ask the host or head waiter to be directed.
responses.phonetic: AH SAH-luh DIH PEHD-ruh EH OO-muh AH-reeuh DOO rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih AW kuh-LYOW. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW ahnng-feet-REEOWN OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh PUH-ruh SIHR ayng-kuh-mee-NYAH-doo.
responses.local: A sala de pedra é uma área do Restaurante O Calhau. Pergunte ao anfitrião ou ao chefe de sala para ser encaminhado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the stone dining room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de pedra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH PEHD-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese restaurants typically use simple spatial references like 'ao fundo' for internal navigation.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao anfitrião ou ao chefe de sala.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW ahnng-feet-REEOWN OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the host or the head waiter.

responses.english: Ask the host or the head waiter.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW ahnng-feet-REEOWN OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao anfitrião ou ao chefe de sala.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso falar com o anfitrião para fazer reservas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo fuh-LAHR KOHM AW ahnng-feet-REEOWN PUH-ruh fuh-ZEHR reh-ZEH-ruh-vuhsh?

likely_response.local: No balcão da entrada, junto ao terraço.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN DUH ayngt-RAH-duh, ZHOONNG-too OW teh-RAH-soo.
likely_response.translation_en: The host is at the entrance counter. You can talk to him for reservations or ask about the seaside terrace.

responses.english: The host is at the entrance counter. You can talk to him for reservations or ask about the seaside terrace.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN DUH ayngt-RAH-duh, ZHOONNG-too OW teh-RAH-soo.
responses.local: No balcão da entrada, junto ao terraço.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the stone dining room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de pedra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH PEHD-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The stone dining room is a distinct feature of the restaurant, often requested for its ambiance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Cozido das Furnas is served
phrases.text_local: Onde é servido o Cozido das Furnas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH seh-ruh-VEE-doo AW koo-ZEE-doo DUHSH FOO-ruh-nuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Cozido das Furnas is a traditional Azorean stew; the terrace is a popular spot for enjoying it with a sea view.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the maritime terrace is
phrases.cultural_note: Coastal venues usually route terrace access through side or rear entrances to preserve indoor seating flow.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o terraço marítimo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo muh-REE-tee-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the maritime terrace.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the maritime terrace.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo muh-REE-tee-moo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o terraço marítimo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the host stand for reservations is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o balcão de reservas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW bahl-KOWN DIH reh-ZEH-ruh-vuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Reservation desks are conventionally placed near the entrance for immediate guest reception and queue management.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, right at the entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, right at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a sala de pedra?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH SAH-luh DIH PEHD-ruh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao anfitrião ou ao chefe de sala. Eles podem indicar-lhe a sala de pedra.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW ahnng-feet-REEOWN OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh. EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR-LYIH AH SAH-luh DIH PEHD-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the host or the head waiter. They can show you to the stone dining room.

responses.english: Ask the host or the head waiter. They can show you to the stone dining room.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW ahnng-feet-REEOWN OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh. EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR-LYIH AH SAH-luh DIH PEHD-ruh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao anfitrião ou ao chefe de sala. Eles podem indicar-lhe a sala de pedra.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Terraço Marítimo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo muh-REE-tee-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Maritime Terrace.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Maritime Terrace.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo muh-REE-tee-moo.
